response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have a single brief C++ role from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, or IEC 62443 security practices required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and community technical initiatives
Extensive background in distributed systems and event-driven architectures
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience in the last 9 years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) and industrial protocols
Primary tech stack is web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js), not embedded or real-time systems
